dict.string: agentd captures windows you are actively working in to build local memory for EvalOps agents. Capture is opt-in per app, gated by policy, and pause-able from the menu bar.
agentd reads window titles and focused-document paths via the Accessibility API to label captures. It does not synthesize input or read other apps' values without policy approval.
agentd uses NSWorkspace events to detect app focus changes for capture timing.
